target: 2. A Drowning Man Grasps at Straw
Shinpei!
Ushio, where's Haine?
It's fine — she's not chasing us.
Good.
(Ryunosuke… His injuries seem worse than I thought.)
(It's convenient that Haine is chasing us…)

Fight on, Ryunosuke.
When you get down the mountain, have Sou check you.

Zee… zee…
That girl… she…

They're not chasing right now.
You can relax.
I see…

Haine…
Why did this happen…?
Ushio, can you sense Haine?

I don't feel anything.
If we can escape like this, it'll be fine--
Ugh!!
Ryunosuke!?

Ugh… I'm sorry… older sister.
My legs… won't move…
You don't need to apologize.

Try to make it to that tree shade.
We'll treat the wounds first.
Y-yes…
Fuh…

(Ryunosuke seems to have calmed down a bit.
He must have been pushing himself hard this whole time.)
Even if we treat him, he might not be able to descend the mountain on his own.
I've stopped the bleeding, but…

Thank you, older sister…
It's much better now.

I don't need lies.
False information will confuse people's judgment.
You're still strict even in this situation.

But what happened?
The wounds look like they were caused by wild dogs…
Haha… maybe wild dogs would have been kinder.
What do you mean?
The girl in the clothes earlier suddenly bit me.
That's impossible!

Your wounds are deep…
It's definitely not the work of a human…
I know it's hard to believe, but it's the truth.
Haine… why would she…
Older sister…
…What?
That girl… she seemed to know you.

I guess that girl…
Was the one you mentioned earlier… 'friend'?
…I'm sorry.

I've never seen Haine like that.
I hoped it was a mistake…
But…
It's true that you were hurt…
It's rare… for you to be so kind.
Don't say such strange things right now.

Strange things…
Indeed… strange things have been happening today.

Being attacked by a small girl…
Hearing strange voices…
…Strange voices?

Before she attacked me… I heard it.
"Go and you'll be killed."

It wasn't the girl's voice…
It was a man's voice around my age.
…You heard it too?
Huh…?

I heard it too.
Though it was fragmented, I think it said you were in danger.
That voice… was also a man's voice around our age.

It felt like I was being guided by that voice…
I found you being attacked by Haine.
…What does that mean?

I don't know.
There was someone else in the forest besides us…

Enemy or ally… someone whose identity we don't know…
They might have warned us of the danger.

But why didn't they show themselves?
Just a voice?
Good… Shinpei's voice reached Hizuru properly!

Ah.
Then maybe we can help again some other time.
Wha…!?
Shinpei, I sense a Shadow!

Damn it, right after I say it…!
Is Haine chasing us!?
No… it's similar to the feeling of the ones underground!
I see…
They're almost here!
Where!?

Aa… Oe… 
Sn… sn…
…There!
It seems they haven't noticed Hizuru and the others yet…
That's probably just a matter of time…
(Ryunosuke can't move properly yet, and with the current Hizuru, we can't even fight the Shadow…)
(We have to let someone know about this as soon as possible!)
Nagumo-sensei!!

…!?
That voice…?

A monster is approaching!
Please don't let them notice!
Older sister, that voice…
You heard it too?

A monster…?
I could only catch fragments, but…
Something dangerous is…
What is that black mass…
Older sister? What's wrong?

Shh!
There's something over there.

Eh… what do you mean?
Was that girl chasing us?

No, it's completely different.
A monster that looks nothing like Haine is approaching…

What are they?
Haine… and that monster…
If we stay like this, we'll be found eventually…

Ryunosuke.
Can you make it to the building?

I'll try… 
Ugh…
Ugh…

I guess we should give up.
You can't move with those legs.
Just stay quiet and wait for them to pass.
I'm sorry… older sister.

Ryunosuke, I'll keep an eye on them.
Stay ready to move at any time.
I understand…

Those two… are they just wandering around?
They're slow, but…

Don't let your guard down!
If they find us, we're done!
(…They're not listening at all!)
…It doesn't seem like a hallucination.
We need to get to the hospital quickly, or Ryunosuke will be in danger.
But if we rush and get caught, it'll be worse.

It's a dead end.
But in this situation… I want to rely on anyone.
Even if I don't know who they are…

--A drowning man grasps at a straw.
That's exactly the situation we're in.
(Professor… why have you been muttering like that?)
"Straw," can you hear me?
Huh…?

If you can hear my voice, answer me.
I need to ask something of you.
"Straw"…?
I get the feeling it's about Shinpei.
Huh, me?

Straw, you can't help us, but you can raise your voice--
Does that work?
Ah… yes, that's right!

If my guess is correct…
I need you to call for help.

I saw a hunter man on the way here.
He might still be nearby.
If it's him, probably…

Hunter… meaning Nezu-san?
Nezu-san is in this mountain!

If it's Nezu-san,
he might have something
that could be used as a weapon.
Shinpei, I'll go find him!

Wait, Ushio!
I'm coming too!

If we get separated, I don't know
what might happen. Your words might not reach them.
Got it!

Nagumo-sensei!
I'll definitely bring help!
Please, hide well until then!
…It seems the voice reached them.
Let's go, Shinpei!
Ah!
I'm counting on you, Straw…
